_metadata.author: UMRS Project
_metadata.scope: Advisory reference — UMRS is a reference system, not a production deployment
notes: US CUI is organized as a category taxonomy with 72+ named markings under a single sensitivity level (s1 in MLS, s0 in targeted).
All CUI markings share sensitivity level s1 — differentiation is by MCS category, not sensitivity.
Handling requirements are defined in the companion file US-CUI-HANDLING.json, linked via handling_group_id.
Category numbers c0-c149 are allocated; c150-c199 reserved for US growth.
Palette colors are defined in the shared UMRS-PALETTE.json file, linked via palette_ref.

CUI.name: Controlled Unclassified Information
CUI.description: Baseline Controlled Unclassified Information. Represents information subject to safeguarding or dissemination controls per law, regulation, or policy.
CUI.handling: Must be stored, transmitted, and shared only with authorized users. Must be encrypted when leaving controlled environments. Apply CUI markings.
CUI.handling_restrictions: Must be safeguarded from unauthorized access and shared only with authorized personnel who have a lawful government purpose. Requires access control and proper dissemination markings. Must not be posted publicly. No encryption requirement beyond standard organizational policy.

CUI//CRIT.name: Critical Infrastructure
CUI//CRIT.description: Information related to the protection, operation, or vulnerability of critical infrastructure systems and assets.

CUI//CRIT/CEII.name: Critical Energy Infrastructure Information
CUI//CRIT/CEII.description: Information about energy sector infrastructure (generation, transmission, pipelines, etc.) that could be misused to disrupt services or compromise safety.

CUI//CRIT/CVI.name: Chemical-Terrorism Vulnerability Information
CUI//CRIT/CVI.required_warning_statement: WARNING: This record contains Chemical-Terrorism Vulnerability Information controlled by 6 CFR 27.400. Do not disclose to persons without a “need to know” in accordance with 6 CFR 27.400(e). Unauthorized release may result in civil penalties or other action. In any administrative or judicial proceeding, this information shall be treated as classified information in accordance with 6 CFR 27.400(h) and (i).

CUI//CRIT/EMGT.name: Emergency Management
CUI//CRIT/EMGT.description: Information related to emergency management planning, response, recovery, and coordination activities.

CUI//CRIT/ISVI.name: Information Systems Vulnerability Information
CUI//CRIT/ISVI.description: Details about weaknesses, vulnerabilities, or exploitation paths in information systems or networks (e.g., vulnerability reports, scans) that require protection to avoid aiding adversaries.

CUI//CRIT/PHYS.name: Physical Security
CUI//CRIT/PHYS.description: Information related to physical security measures, vulnerabilities, or protection of facilities and assets.

CUI//CRIT/WATER.name: Water Assessments
CUI//CRIT/WATER.description: Information related to assessments of drinking water systems and water infrastructure, including treatment, distribution, and vulnerability data.

CUI//DEF.name: Defense
CUI//DEF.description: Information related to Department of Defense operations, systems, and programs requiring controlled handling.

CUI//DEF/CTI.name: Controlled Technical Information (Defense)
CUI//DEF/CTI.description: Technical information (e.g., engineering, technical data, software) with military or space application that requires protection under specific defense-related regulations or contracts.
CUI//DEF/CTI.required_warning_statement: Required Dissemination Control:  Distribution Statement B thru F

CUI//DEF/DCNI.name: Unclassified Controlled Nuclear Information - Defense
CUI//DEF/DCNI.required_warning_statement: Department of Defense Unclassified Controlled Nuclear Information Exempt from mandatory disclosure pursuant to 5 U.S.C. 552(b)(3), as authorized by 10 U.S.C. 128

CUI//DEF/DCRIT.name: DoD Critical
CUI//DEF/DCRIT.description: Information concerning Department of Defense critical infrastructure, including facilities, systems, and supporting assets.

CUI//DEF/NNPI.name: Naval Nuclear Propulsion Information (Defense)
CUI//DEF/NNPI.description: Information concerning naval nuclear propulsion systems and technology protected by statute.

CUI//EXPT.name: Export Controlled
CUI//EXPT.description: Information subject to U.S. export control laws such as ITAR or EAR. This includes technical data, software, or other information whose transfer to foreign persons or countries is restricted.
CUI//EXPT.required_warning_statement: WARNING - This document contains technical data whose export is restricted by the Arms Export Control Act (Title 22, U.S.C., Sec 2751, et seq.) or the Export Control Reform Act of 2018 (Title 50, U.S.C., Chapter 58, Sec. 4801-4852). Violations of these export laws are subject to severe criminal penalties. Disseminate in accordance with provisions of DoD Directive 5230.25. Required Dissemination Control:  Distribution Statement B through F

CUI//EXPT/EXPTR.name: Export Controlled Research
CUI//EXPT/EXPTR.description: Research data that falls under export control, often arising in academic or R&D contexts where results could be export-controlled.

CUI//FNC.name: General Financial Information
CUI//FNC.description: Financially sensitive information, including transactional, operational, or proprietary financial details protected under regulatory frameworks.
CUI//FNC.handling_restrictions: Requires restricted access, protection from tampering, and integrity-preserving storage. Often requires audit logging and controlled dissemination

CUI//FNC/BUDG.name: Budget Information
CUI//FNC/BUDG.description: Non-public budget planning, allocation, and fiscal strategy information related to government funding and appropriations.

CUI//IMMG.name: Immigration
CUI//IMMG.description: Information related to immigration status, proceedings, and benefits requiring controlled handling.

CUI//IMMG/PROT.name: Temporary Protected Status (Immigration)
CUI//IMMG/PROT.description: Information related to individuals granted Temporary Protected Status under immigration law.

CUI//INTEL.name: Intelligence
CUI//INTEL.description: Sensitive intelligence support data not formally classified but requiring controlled dissemination.

CUI//INTEL/OPSEC.name: Operations Security (Intelligence)
CUI//INTEL/OPSEC.description: Information whose uncontrolled exposure would undermine operational security (e.g., patterns revealing how an organization operates, schedules, specific capabilities).

CUI//LEI.name: Law Enforcement Information
CUI//LEI.description: Information related to law enforcement activities, investigations, operations, and sensitive records.

CUI//LEI/AIV.name: Accident Investigation
CUI//LEI/AIV.description: Investigative records, forensic analyses, and official findings related to accident investigations conducted by law enforcement authorities.

CUI//LEI/CHRI.name: Criminal History Records Information
CUI//LEI/CHRI.description: Criminal history record information including arrest records, charges, dispositions, and law enforcement identification data.

CUI//LEI/CMPRS.name: Committed Person
CUI//LEI/CMPRS.description: ecords pertaining to individuals legally committed through judicial or law enforcement processes, including custody and case documentation.

CUI//LEI/FUND.name: Campaign Funds
CUI//LEI/FUND.description: Financial tracking, seizure, forfeiture, or investigative accounting records associated with law enforcement operations.

CUI//LEI/INF.name: Informant
CUI//LEI/INF.description: Sensitive information identifying or provided by confidential informants supporting investigative or intelligence activities.

CUI//INV.name: Investigation
CUI//INV.description: Active or closed investigative case records, evidence documentation, and operational law enforcement reporting.

CUI//LEI/JUV.name: Juvenile
CUI//LEI/JUV.description: Law enforcement records involving juveniles, protected under statutory confidentiality and restricted dissemination requirements.

CUI//LEI/LCOMM.name: Communications
CUI//LEI/LCOMM.description: Intercepted, monitored, or retained law enforcement communications including authorized surveillance or operational exchanges.

CUI//LEI/LDNA.name: DNA
CUI//LEI/LDNA.description: Forensic DNA profiles, laboratory analyses, and genetic identification records maintained for investigative purposes.

CUI//LEI/LFNC.name: Law Enforcement Financial Records
CUI//LEI/LFNC.description: Financial documentation tied to criminal investigations including fraud, laundering, or asset tracing activities.

CUI//LEI/LNSL.name: National Security Letter
CUI//LEI/LNSL.description: Records and supporting documentation associated with National Security Letters issued under authorized investigative authority.

CUI//LEI/LSCRN.name: Terrorist Screening
CUI//LEI/LSCRN.description: Terrorist screening datasets, watchlist correlations, and identity vetting records maintained by law enforcement.

CUI//LEI/RWRD.name: Reward
CUI//LEI/RWRD.description: Documentation related to reward programs, informant compensation, or public incentive investigative initiatives.

CUI//LEI/SCV.name: Sex Crime Victim
CUI//LEI/SCV.description: Protected victim information related to sexual crimes, safeguarded to preserve privacy and investigative integrity.

CUI//LEI/SUB.name: Controlled Substances
CUI//LEI/SUB.description: Records concerning controlled substances including enforcement actions, seizure logs, and regulatory violations.

CUI//LEI/TRACE.name: Pen Register/Trap & Trace
CUI//LEI/TRACE.description: Pen register and trap-and-trace surveillance data collected under authorized legal monitoring operations.

CUI//LEI/WHISTL.name: Whistleblower Identity
CUI//LEI/WHISTL.description: Protected identity and disclosure records of whistleblowers supporting investigative or oversight activities.

CUI//LGL.name: Legal
CUI//LGL.description: Information related to legal proceedings, judicial records, and privileged legal materials requiring controlled handling.

CUI//LGL/LMI.name: Legislative Materials
CUI//LGL/LMI.description: Information related to legislative materials, including non-public legislative records and supporting documents.

CUI//LGL/PRIVILEGE.name: Legal Privilege
CUI//LGL/PRIVILEGE.required_warning_statement: Required Dissemination Control:  ATTORNEY-CLIENT or ATTORNEY-WP

CUI//NCR.name: Natural and Cultural Resources
CUI//NCR.description: Information related to the protection of archaeological, historical, and natural park system resources.

CUI//NUC/UCNI.name: Unclassified Controlled Nuclear Information - Energy
CUI//NUC/UCNI.required_warning_statement: Unclassified Controlled Nuclear Information Not for Public Dissemination Unauthorized dissemination subject to civil and criminal sanctions under section 148 of the Atomic Energy Act of 1954, as amended (42 U.S.C. 2168). Additional Marking Requirement:  Unclassified Controlled Nuclear Information will be placed at the bottom of all pages

CUI//PAT.name: Patent
CUI//PAT.description: Information related to patent applications, inventions, and secrecy orders requiring controlled handling.

CUI//PAT/PSEC.name: Secrecy Orders (Patent)
CUI//PAT/PSEC.description: Information subject to patent secrecy orders restricting disclosure of certain inventions.

CUI//PRIV.name: Privacy
CUI//PRIV.description: Personally identifiable information and privacy-protected records requiring controlled handling under federal privacy law.

CUI//PRIV/CONTRACT.name: Contract Use
CUI//PRIV/CONTRACT.description: Personally identifiable information collected or used in the context of contractual relationships.

CUI//PRIV/DREC.name: Death Records
CUI//PRIV/DREC.description: Information contained in death records that is protected from public disclosure.

CUI//PRIV/GENETIC.name: Genetic Information
CUI//PRIV/GENETIC.description: Information about genetic tests or characteristics (DNA, inherited traits) that are individually identifiable and protected.

CUI//PRIV/MIL.name: Military Personnel Records
CUI//PRIV/MIL.description: Personnel data for military members that requires safeguarding (assignments, performance, non-public details, etc.).

CUI//PRIV/PERS.name: Personnel Records
CUI//PRIV/PERS.description: Similar to MIL but broader: personnel records for non-military staff or employees.

CUI//PRIV/PRIIG.name: Inspector General Protected
CUI//PRIV/PRIIG.description: Personally identifiable information protected in the context of Inspector General activities.

CUI//PRIV/STUD.name: Student Records
CUI//PRIV/STUD.description: Education records related to identifiable students that are protected by privacy requirements.

CUI//PROCURE.name: Procurement and Acquisition
CUI//PROCURE.description: Information related to government acquisition, bidding, procurement, and contract negotiation that must be protected during competitive phases.

CUI//PROCURE/SBIZ.name: Small Business Research and Technology
CUI//PROCURE/SBIZ.description: Acquisition data related to small business research, innovation grants, and technology development programs.

CUI//PROCURE/SSEL.name: Source Selection
CUI//PROCURE/SSEL.description: ource selection materials including evaluation criteria, scoring records, and award decision documentation.

CUI//PROPIN.name: General Proprietary Business Information
CUI//PROPIN.description: Proprietary business information provided to the government that is protected from unauthorized disclosure.
CUI//PROPIN.required_dissemination_control: Additional Note: Pursuant to 10 CFR 600.15, an application or other document, including any unsolicited information, may include technical data and other data, including trade secrets and commercial or financial information that is privileged or confidential, which the applicant does not want disclosed to the public or used by the Government for any purpose other than application evaluation.  To protect such data, the submitter must mark the cover sheet of the application or other document with the following Notice: NOTICE OF RESTRICTION ON DISCLOSURE AND USE OF DATA Pages [____] of this document may contain trade secrets or commercial or financial information that is privileged or confidential and is exempt from public disclosure. Such information shall be used or disclosed only for evaluation purposes or in accordance with a financial assistance or loan agreement between the submitter and the Government. The Government may use or disclose any information that is not appropriately marked or otherwise restricted, regardless of source.

CUI//PROPIN/MFC.name: Proprietary Manufacturer
CUI//PROPIN/MFC.description: Proprietary manufacturing processes, designs, or production data submitted under protected disclosure.

CUI//PROPIN/OCCMTO.name: Ocean Common Carrier and Marine Terminal Operator Agreements

CUI//TAX.name: Federal Taxpayer Information
CUI//TAX.description: Federal taxpayer information protected from unauthorized disclosure under tax law.

CUI//TAX/CONV.name: Tax Convention
CUI//TAX/CONV.description: Information exchanged under international tax conventions, treaties, and bilateral fiscal agreements.

CUI//TAX/TAI.name: Taxpayer Advocate Information
CUI//TAX/TAI.description: Taxpayer Advocate Service case records and protected taxpayer assistance documentation.

CUI//TAX/WDT.name: Written Determinations
CUI//TAX/WDT.description: IRS written determinations including rulings, determinations, and interpretive tax guidance.

CUI//TRANS.name: Transportation
CUI//TRANS.description: Information related to transportation safety, security, and regulatory records requiring controlled handling.

CUI//TRANS/RAIL.name: Railroad Safety Analysis Records
CUI//TRANS/RAIL.description: Information related to railroad safety analysis, inspections, or incident assessments.

CUI//TRANS/SSI.name: Sensitive Security Information
CUI//TRANS/SSI.required_warning_statement: WARNING: This record contains Sensitive Security Information that is controlled under 49 CFR parts 15 and 1520. No part of this record may be disclosed to persons without a “need to know”, as defined in 49 CFR parts 15 and 1520, except with the written permission of the Administrator of the Transportation Security Administration or the Secretary of Transportation. Unauthorized release may result in civil penalty or other action. For U.S. government agencies, public disclosure is governed by 5 U.S.C. 552 and 49 CFR parts 15 and 1520.
